prompt: Edit image 1 by changing the appearance of the fractured clavicle to resemble the smooth contour shown in image 2, simulating a healed state. Then, apply a heatmap overlay to image 1, similar in style and colorization to image 3, highlighting the bone or surrounding tissue.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which displays a fractured left clavicle, by seamlessly modifying the fractured bone fragments to resemble the smooth, continuous contour of the healed clavicle shown in image 2, simulating a complete recovery. Subsequently, apply a semi-transparent heatmap overlay onto the *edited* image 1. This heatmap should cover the left clavicle and surrounding shoulder region, utilizing the gradient colorization and style from image 3 to highlight the bone and its immediate surrounding tissue with varying intensity.
objects: X-ray image of human upper torso
